summary: Frontend-only PWA testing for Suzuki SellWise Welcome screen completed successfully. All required data-testids render, EN→ID language switch and persistence work, manifest.json and service-worker.js are served correctly with proper headers, Manrope font loads, SW registers, and there are zero console errors on initial load and on Get Started click.

issues: Container max-width is 460px on sm+ breakpoints (sm:max-w-[460px]) instead of the spec'd ~440px. Visually centered correctly (x=730 in 1920 viewport). Minor deviation from spec; tolerated as 'around 440px' but flagging for awareness.

critical_code_review_comments: Welcome.jsx applies sm:max-w-[460px] which slightly exceeds the spec'd ~440px cap. If pixel-perfect cap is required, change to sm:max-w-[440px].

Get Started navigates to '/' which is the same route — fine as a placeholder, but consider disabling the button or making it a no-op until the next route exists, to avoid an unnecessary history entry.
service-worker.js is 1.3KB — caching strategy is minimal. Acceptable for MVP; expand precache list when assets are finalized.
index.html still hosts third-party PostHog and emergent-main.js scripts — fine for the platform but ensure these are intentional for the production PWA build.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully client-side PWA. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://frontend-forge-25.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified data-testids: welcome-screen, welcome-topbar, language-switcher-trigger, language-switcher-current, welcome-brand, welcome-illustration, welcome-headline, welcome-today-prompt, welcome-feature-cards, card-leads, card-smart-calling, card-performance, get-started-btn, welcome-footer, language-switcher-menu, language-option-en, language-option-id all exist and behave correctly. Bahasa text confirmed: 'Ubah Lebih Banyak Prospek.' / 'Jual Lebih Cerdas.', button 'Mulai', prompt 'Apa yang ingin Anda lakukan hari ini?'. localStorage key 'sellwise.lang' persists 'id' across reload. /manifest.json -> 200 valid JSON (name='Suzuki SellWise', short_name='SellWise', display='standalone'). /service-worker.js -> 200 application/javascript, 1347 bytes. SW registers (navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistrations()=1). Manrope font requested from fonts.googleapis.com/fonts.gstatic.com. Zero console errors. Get Started click does not throw and stays on '/'.
